hero.subtitle: Cross-border deal facilitation for the $18B+ Saudi Arabia–Malaysia investment corridor. Shariah-compliant, Vision 2030 aligned. From first introduction to financial close.

globe.label: The Corridor
globe.heading: Connecting
globe.p1: Saudi Vision 2030 is actively pushing capital outward during its peak investment period. Malaysia's Madani Economy is courting Gulf investment aggressively.
globe.p2: The $18B+ bilateral trade corridor is growing — yet no platform serves the mid-market ($2M–$50M deals) where most opportunities exist.

valueProps.label: Why SIA
valueProps.heading: We operate where others don't
valueProps.subtitle: The gap between Big 4 consultants ($500K+ retainers) and investment banks ($100M+ deals only). SIA fills this with technology-enabled, Shariah-compliant deal facilitation.
valueProps.card1desc: End-to-end management from first introduction to financial close. We handle the complexity of cross-border transactions so you can focus on growth.
valueProps.card2desc: Automated dual-jurisdiction compliance across SAGIA and MIDA. Navigate AML/KYC, licensing, and regulatory frameworks with confidence.
valueProps.card3desc: Intelligent pairing of vetted Saudi and Malaysian entities. Our platform identifies optimal partnerships based on sector, size, and strategic fit.

howItWorks.label: The Process
howItWorks.heading: From Introduction to Close in 6 Months
howItWorks.subtitle: A structured, transparent cross-border deal facilitation process that compresses 12–18 month cycles. SAGIA and MIDA compliant.
howItWorks.step1desc: AI-powered entity matching identifies optimal Saudi-Malaysian partnerships based on sector alignment, deal size, and strategic fit.
howItWorks.step2desc: Dual-jurisdiction regulatory navigation. AML/KYC screening, document verification, and compliance frameworks for both SAGIA and MIDA.
howItWorks.step3desc: Transaction design, legal framework, cross-border payment facilitation, and stakeholder alignment across both markets.
howItWorks.step4desc: Final documentation, e-signatures, fund transfer coordination, and post-deal support for ongoing operations.

sectors.label: Sectors
sectors.heading: Eight Industries, One Corridor
sectors.subtitle: Deep sector expertise across the most active Saudi Arabia–Malaysia investment verticals. From halal food to Islamic finance.

testimonials.label: Perspectives
testimonials.heading: What Industry Leaders Say
testimonials.t1quote: The Saudi-Malaysia corridor represents one of the most underserved yet high-potential bilateral investment channels in the emerging market landscape.
testimonials.t2quote: Tokenization and digital platforms are transforming how cross-border investment facilitation works. The middle market is where the real transformation happens.
testimonials.t3quote: Saudi Vision 2030 is creating unprecedented outbound investment flows. Southeast Asia, particularly Malaysia, is a natural destination for Islamic finance capital.
testimonials.t4quote: The halal economy alone represents a $2.3 trillion global opportunity. Malaysia's position as the Islamic finance hub of ASEAN makes it the gateway for Gulf capital.
testimonials.t4name: State of the Global Islamic Economy
testimonials.t5quote: Risk management for institutions entering new bilateral corridors requires specialized knowledge of both regulatory environments. One-size-fits-all approaches fail.
testimonials.t6quote: The future of cross-border deal facilitation is technology-enabled, compliance-first, and corridor-specific. Generic platforms cannot serve specialized bilateral needs.

careers.label: Careers
careers.heading: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: Help us build the infrastructure for cross-border deal facilitation.
careers.role1desc: Build and maintain our mobile applications for iOS and Android. You'll work on client-facing tools that help institutional partners track deals, receive updates, and manage cross-border transactions on the go.

cta.heading: Ready to Explore Cross-Border Opportunities?
cta.subtitle: Start a conversation. No commitment, no minimum deal size required. We'll assess fit and outline next steps in 30 minutes.
cta.trust: Aligned with Saudi Vision 2030 · MIDA Recognized · Dual-Jurisdiction Compliance
